description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a bold color-blocked design, featuring a combination of red, white, and black panels. The upper is primarily constructed from smooth synthetic or leather material, with perforations on the toe box for breathability. Black laces are threaded through black eyelets, and a prominent black swoosh logo is visible on both sides of the shoe. The ankle collar is padded and finished in black, while the heel area is reinforced for added support. The outsole appears to have a patterned tread for traction, and a decorative emblem is embossed on the lateral side near the ankle.
description: A high-top, color-blocked sneaker in red, white, and black with black laces, a swoosh logo, and a padded collar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box perforations, black laces, and the symmetrical color-blocking of red and white.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black swoosh logo, decorative emblem near the ankle, and the layered red, white, and black panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded black collar, red heel reinforcement, and the white midsole band.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the swoosh logo and emblem visible, and the color-blocked design clearly shown.
attribute_logo: black swoosh on both sides; decorative emblem on lateral ankle in black
